gold.title: Auth Page
gold.reason: Split-screen layout (lg:grid-cols-2) with a muted left panel featuring a gradient, brand logo, and testimonial blockquote alongside the right-side form — a textbook premium auth layout pattern with motion animations.

gold.title: Signup Form
gold.reason: Dark-mode first signup card (bg-black) with Tabler icon social buttons (GitHub, Google) and Aceternity's custom Input/Label components — clean premium aesthetic with strong brand personality.

gold.title: Registration
gold.reason: Feature-rich registration form with role selector (BarChart, Code icons), Radix Select/Checkbox primitives, CVA button variants, and eye toggle — a complete, polished multi-field registration experience.

silver.title: Minimal Auth Page
silver.reason: Particle background (120 particles) with radial gradient overlays and GitHub/Google social login — distinctive ambient background effect with clean minimal form, but lighter on layout structure than Gold.

silver.title: Sign Up Block
silver.reason: Shadcn Card-based signup with name/email/password fields, checkbox terms, and show/hide password toggle — solid well-structured component but visually conventional.

silver.title: Sign Up Page
silver.reason: Full-page signup with gradient background, first/last name split fields, password visibility toggle, and terms checkbox — competent layout but no animations or distinctive visual elements.

silver.title: Image Slider
silver.reason: Framer Motion animated image slider with interval-based transitions — a useful visual panel component often paired with split-screen auth layouts, but not a standalone signup form.

bronze.title: Login 1
bronze.reason: Basic toggle between login/signup states with plain HTML inputs and no Tailwind classes beyond minimal inline styling — bare-bones with no visual design investment.

bronze.title: Sign Up
bronze.reason: Direct shadcn Card + Input + Label + Button composition identical to the shadcn blocks recipe — no custom layout or visual treatment beyond the base component library.
